# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for hardcoded secrets and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any hardcoded credentials, tokens, API keys, or encryption keys in code, config, or logs.
4. Replace hardcoded secrets with secure configuration or a secret manager and remove them from source/logs.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

// config/services.php (add to existing config)
return [
    // ... other services

    'twilio' => [
        'sid' => env('TWILIO_SID'),
        'auth_token' => env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'),
        'from_number' => env('TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER'),
    ],
];

// .env.example (template only — never commit actual .env)
// TWILIO_SID=your_twilio_sid_here
// TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=your_twilio_auth_token_here
// TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=your_twilio_phone_number_here

<?php

// app/Services/TwilioSmsService.php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Twilio\Rest\Client as TwilioClient;
use Twilio\Exceptions\TwilioException;
use InvalidArgumentException;
use RuntimeException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    /**
     * Twilio Account SID.
     */
    protected string $sid;

    /**
     * Twilio Auth Token.
     */
    protected string $authToken;

    /**
     * Twilio "From" phone number.
     */
    protected string $fromNumber;

    /**
     * Twilio REST client instance.
     */
    protected ?TwilioClient $client = null;

    /**
     * Create a new TwilioSmsService instance.
     * Credentials are read from config/services.php which in turn reads from .env.
     *
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->sid = Config::get('services.twilio.sid', '');
        $this->authToken = Config::get('services.twilio.auth_token', '');
        $this->fromNumber = Config::get('services.twilio.from_number', '');

        $this->validateCredentials();
    }

    /**
     * Validate that all required Twilio credentials are present.
     *
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    protected function validateCredentials(): void
    {
        if (empty($this->sid)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Twilio SID is not configured. Please set TWILIO_SID in your .env file.'
            );
        }

        if (empty($this->authToken)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Twilio Auth Token is not configured. Please set TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN in your .env file.'
            );
        }

        if (empty($this->fromNumber)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Twilio From Number is not configured. Please set TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER in your .env file.'
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get or create the Twilio client instance (lazy initialization).
     *
     * @return TwilioClient
     * @throws TwilioException
     */
    protected function getClient(): TwilioClient
    {
        if ($this->client === null) {
            $this->client = new TwilioClient($this->sid, $this->authToken);
        }

        return $this->client;
    }

    /**
     * Set a custom Twilio client (useful for testing/mocking).
     *
     * @param TwilioClient $client
     * @return self
     */
    public function setClient(TwilioClient $client): self
    {
        $this->client = $client;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Send an SMS message to the specified phone number.
     *
     * @param string $toNumber The recipient's phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890).
     * @param string $message  The SMS message body.
     * @return array            An array containing the message SID and status.
     *
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     * @throws RuntimeException
     */
    public function sendSms(string $toNumber, string $message): array
    {
        $this->validateSmsParameters($toNumber, $message);

        try {
            $client = $this->getClient();

            $twilioMessage = $client->messages->create(
                $toNumber,
                [
                    'from' => $this->fromNumber,
                    'body' => $message,
                ]
            );

            // Log success without exposing sensitive data
            Log::info('SMS sent successfully.', [
                'message_sid' => $twilioMessage->sid,
                'to' => $this->maskPhoneNumber($toNumber),
                'status' => $twilioMessage->status,
            ]);

            return [
                'success' => true,
                'message_sid' => $twilioMessage->sid,
                'status' => $twilioMessage->status,
                'date_created' => $twilioMessage->dateCreated?->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
            ];
        } catch (TwilioException $e) {
            // Log the error without exposing credentials or full phone numbers
            Log::error('Failed to send SMS via Twilio.', [
                'error_code' => $e->getCode(),
                'error_message' => $e->getMessage(),
                'to' => $this->maskPhoneNumber($toNumber),
            ]);

            throw new RuntimeException(
                'Failed to send SMS: ' . $e->getMessage(),
                $e->getCode(),
                $e
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Send an SMS message to multiple recipients.
     *
     * @param array  $toNumbers An array of phone numbers in E.164 format.
     * @param string $message   The SMS message body.
     * @return array             An array of results for each recipient.
     */
    public function sendBulkSms(array $toNumbers, string $message): array
    {
        $results = [];

        foreach ($toNumbers as $toNumber) {
            try {
                $results[$toNumber] = $this->sendSms($toNumber, $message);
            } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
                $results[$toNumber] = [
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => $e->getMessage(),
                ];
            }
        }

        return $results;
    }

    /**
     * Check the status of a previously sent message.
     *
     * @param string $messageSid The Twilio message SID.
     * @return array
     *
     * @throws RuntimeException
     */
    public function getMessageStatus(string $messageSid): array
    {
        if (empty($messageSid)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Message SID cannot be empty.');
        }

        try {
            $client = $this->getClient();
            $message = $client->messages($messageSid)->fetch();

            return [
                'message_sid' => $message->sid,
                'status' => $message->status,
                'date_sent' => $message->dateSent?->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
                'error_code' => $message->errorCode,
                'error_message' => $message->errorMessage,
            ];
        } catch (TwilioException $e) {
            Log::error('Failed to fetch message status from Twilio.', [
                'message_sid' => $messageSid,
                'error_message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);

            throw new RuntimeException(
                'Failed to fetch message status: ' . $e->getMessage(),
                $e->getCode(),
                $e
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validate SMS parameters before sending.
     *
     * @param string $toNumber
     * @param string $message
     *
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    protected function validateSmsParameters(string $toNumber, string $message): void
    {
        if (empty($toNumber)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Recipient phone number cannot be empty.');
        }

        // Basic E.164 format validation
        if (!preg_match('/^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$/', $toNumber)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Phone number must be in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890). Received: ' . $this->maskPhoneNumber($toNumber)
            );
        }

        if (empty($message)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('SMS message body cannot be empty.');
        }

        // Twilio SMS body limit is 1600 characters
        if (mb_strlen($message) > 1600) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'SMS message body exceeds the maximum length of 1600 characters.'
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Mask a phone number for safe logging (e.g., +1234567890 becomes +1***7890).
     *
     * @param string $phoneNumber
     * @return string
     */
    protected function maskPhoneNumber(string $phoneNumber): string
    {
        $length = strlen($phoneNumber);

        if ($length <= 5) {
            return str_repeat('*', $length);
        }

        $visiblePrefix = substr($phoneNumber, 0, 2);
        $visibleSuffix = substr($phoneNumber, -4);
        $maskedMiddle = str_repeat('*', max($length - 6, 1));

        return $visiblePrefix . $maskedMiddle . $visibleSuffix;
    }

    /**
     * Get the configured "from" phone number.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getFromNumber(): string
    {
        return $this->fromNumber;
    }
}

<?php

// app/Providers/TwilioServiceProvider.php

namespace App\Providers;

use App\Services\TwilioSmsService;
use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;

class TwilioServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    /**
     * Register services.
     */
    public function register(): void
    {
        $this->app->singleton(TwilioSmsService::class, function ($app) {
            return new TwilioSmsService();
        });
    }

    /**
     * Bootstrap services.
     */
    public function boot(): void
    {
        //
    }
}
